description: The 'Ndrina Faillace is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cassano all'Ionio, Calabria, Italy. It operates in the Sibari Plain and the province of Cosenza, belonging to the Locale of Sibari. The group emerged victorious from a feud with the Abruzzese-Pepe clan of Lauropoli, alongside the Forastefano and Portoraro families. In 2009, assets including land, vehicles, and companies were confiscated from the Faillace family.
